_publications._publicationTitle: Longitudinal evaluation of quality of life in 288 patients with neurofibromatosis 2.

_contextSnippet: The NFTI-QOL was related to ClinSev (r = 0.41, p < 0.001; r = 0.46 for all visits), but was only related weakly to GenSev (r = 0.16, p < 0.05; r = 0.15 for all visits)
details: NFTI-QOL related to clinical severity (r = 0.41, p < 0.001; r = 0.46 for all visits) but only weakly to genetic severity (r = 0.16, p < 0.05; r = 0.15 for all visits)
